use std::sync::Arc;

struct DbPool {
    url: String,
}

impl DbPool {
    fn new(url: &str) -> Self {
        Self { url: url.to_string() }
    }

    fn query(&self, sql: &str) -> Vec<Row> {
        // ... database query
        vec![]
    }
}

struct AppState {
    db_url: String,
}

// BAD: pool created on every incoming request
async fn handle_request(state: &AppState) -> Response {
    let pool = DbPool::new(&state.db_url);
    let rows = pool.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE active = true");
    build_response(rows)
}
